title: Clinical and Molecular Profiles of a Cohort of Egyptian Patients with Collagen VI-Related Dystrophy.
author: Sharaf-Eldin WE Rafat K Issa MY Elbendary HM Eissa NR Hawaary B Gaboon NEA Maroofian R Gleeson JG Essawi ML Zaki MS
content: S-EPMC11452470 PMC11452470 Clinical and Molecular Profiles of a Cohort of Egyptian Patients with Collagen VI-Related Dystrophy. Collagen VI-related dystrophies (COL6-RD) display a wide spectrum of disease severity and genetic variability ranging from mild Bethlem myopathy (BM) to severe Ullrich
